Remedy: Nothing can stop the weapon from ‘exploding, Ifthe weapon stops working, a suc ‘cessful weapon skill oll returns it to normal function, 
HT Stun Guns Stun guns do no damage. Instead, any liv. ing target which is hit is stunned for several ‘combat rounds; rol the die, halve the number rolled and round fractions down to determine how many rounds, During ths time, the target may not take any action, 
Malfunction: Ail beings within 5 meters are stunned (roll as above 0 determine the umber of rounds) 
Remedy: A successful weapon skill rol repairs the weapon, Ifa character attempts to repair the weapon and fails, he is knocked un conscious and the weapon is permanently busted 
Wi Tanglers 
‘A tangler throws a 4 meter adhesive rope, which wraps itself around the target and gradually contracts, It does no damage, but ‘when a target is hit, the gamemaster rolls on the Hit Location Table (Fold-Out B) to deter- mine the body location to which the tangler rope adheres. f the head is hit, the rope is, assumed to have wrapped around the target’s neck, and the target will die of strangulation 
Jn several rounds (roll the die to determine how ‘many) unless the rope is removed. The victim. ‘needs the aid of another to retiove it.but this, takes only one round. If any other body loca- tion is hit, that area is immobilized and the target loses its use, Again, he may remove the rope in one round with theaid of another, 
Malfunction: It stops working, 
Remedy: A successful weapon skill rol fies It. An unsuccessful rll means all the adhesive ropes burst out and stick to the character at tempting the repair.
